name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Salt Lake, still covered?
description: Yes, if doctor links to work; report within 180 days.[1]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Salt Lake, still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if doctor links to work; report within 180 days.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if linked to incident; Utah covers delayed symptoms from work injuries.[1] Doctor causation key.[2] Key factors: Medical timeline; no intervening causes. Practical guidance: See doctor soon; explain delay. Document everything. Delayed claims common, report within 180 days.[1]
